description: Production Linux Server Monitoring — CPU, Memory, Disk, Network, Uptime

targets.expr: max(100 - (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}) * 100)
max(100 - (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/home", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/home", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}) * 100)
max(100 - (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/var", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/var", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}) * 100)
max(100 - (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/tmp", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/tmp", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}) * 100)
max(100 - (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/boot", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint="/boot", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}) * 100)

max by (mountpoint) (node_filesystem_size_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint=~"^(/|/home|/opt|/var|/boot)$", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs"}) - max by (mountpoint) (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{node=~"$node", mountpoint=~"^(/|/home|/opt|/var|/boot)$", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs"})
